scope: one active GitHub issue session activation

safeProjection.source: one explicit SDK observation tag selected by observable extension configuration

eventContract.parentage: nested work, role, tool, and subagent starts use the enclosing event id as parentId
eventContract.activationClose: emit one context close event from the explicit activation context before sink settlement

forbiddenExport: flow input or output unless separately enabled and redacted

placement.liteCore: no change for projection; wrapExec, parent, ContextData.seekTag, and onClose are sufficient
placement.observableExtension: accept one named projection tag, copy only allowed scalar keys, classify AbortError as cancelled, and emit activation close before existing sink flush and close
placement.sdk: define the safe observation namespace; callers provide activation fields and declared flows explicitly compose work, channel, role, tool, and subagent fields through exec tags

unresolved: public tag and event field names
activation id allocation and persistence boundary
whether cancellation extends Observable.Phase or uses a separate terminal field
